raw:
{

"judge_id": "judge_1",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified a conceptual issue with the framing of plating onset detection and proposed a tighter framing, but did not name the load-bearing concept explicitly.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walked the argument chain end-to-end, flagged multiple inconsistencies, and proposed repairs for each, demonstrating thorough logical consistency analysis.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against corresponding evidence, identifying gaps in validation and circularity in onset timing extraction.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims, such as lead-time comparisons and sample size limitations, but did not mark confidence for every recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed scope without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identified harmful patterns in the original draft and proposed mitigations, with no regressions introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked annotation with sources or reasons."
},
"confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified a conceptual issue with the framing of plating onset detection and proposed a tighter framing, but did not name the load-bearing concept explicitly.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked the argument chain end-to-end, flagged multiple inconsistencies, and proposed repairs for each, demonstrating thorough logical consistency analysis.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against corresponding evidence, identifying gaps in validation and circularity in onset timing extraction.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims, such as lead-time comparisons and sample size limitations, but did not mark confidence for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified harmful patterns in the original draft and proposed mitigations, with no regressions introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked annotation with sources or reasons.
